title: Ratchet
description: A PvP mod about Magic and Kinetics
body:
# **Ratchet**

**Ratchet** is a PvP mod about magic, kinetics, and mechanical weapons.

The main focus of this mod is adding weapons that reward strong positioning, and multi-tasking. Most **Ratchet** weapons are built around storing energy, releasing it at the right moment, and using that stored force to change how fights play out.

---

## **Ratchet Driver**

The **Ratchet Driver** is a balanced mechanical weapon that stores charge while blocking.

When the weapon has a stored charge, landing a hit deals bonus damage and releases a controlled shockwave around the target. This makes the **Ratchet Driver** useful for players who want a strong melee weapon without making it feel like pure raw damage.

The **Ratchet Driver** can use **Obliterate**, which lowers direct hit damage but greatly increases the power of the shockwave.

It can also use **Overcharge**, which adds two extra max charges and lets the weapon store even more energy, at the cost of backlash when pushed too far.

---

## **Overcrank Ratchet Driver**

The **Overcrank Ratchet Driver** is a more extreme version of the **Ratchet Driver**.

It stores much more charge, allowing for heavier follow-up attacks and stronger charged impacts. Critical hits can also add extra stored charge after a short delay, making it stronger when used aggressively and timed well.

Charged impacts from the **Overcrank Ratchet Driver** can also damage armor durability.

The **Overcrank Ratchet Driver** can use **Overcharge**, which pushes the charge limit even higher for stronger stored hits.

It can also use **Inversion**, which reverses the shockwave and pulls enemies inward instead of launching them away.

---

## **Heavy Ratchet Driver**

The **Heavy Ratchet Driver** is a slower and heavier **Ratchet** weapon built for brutal impact.

Charged strikes slam enemies downward, partially pierce armor, and create a much larger shockwave than the standard **Ratchet Driver**. This makes it better for heavy hits, area pressure, and punishing grouped enemies.

The **Heavy Ratchet Driver** can use **Obliterate**, which turns charged impacts into a much more destructive area blast.

It can also use **Overcharge**, which adds two extra max charges for even more devastating hits.

---

## **Latchet Rebounder**

The **Latchet Rebounder** is a mechanical ranged weapon that stores up to 5 charges.

When fired, it releases stored charge as a burst of instant hitscan shots. Stored charge slowly decays over time if left unused, so the weapon is strongest when charge is built and used intentionally.

The **Latchet Rebounder** can use **Rapid Fire**, which replaces stored charge with a sustained spinning barrage that ramps up as it fires.

It can also use **Railpiercer**, which fires stronger shots that pierce through one block and one target.

---

## **Ratchet Indexer**

The **Ratchet Indexer** is a utility device based around anchors and movement.

Right-clicking stores an anchor point. Sneak-right-clicking activates the device and changes what it does depending on its current mode.

In **Untuned** mode, the **Ratchet Indexer** indexes nearby living entities to the anchor.

In **Tuned** mode, it teleports the player to the anchor.

In **Half-Tune** mode, it sends nearby dropped items to the anchor.

---

## **Mechanical Tuner**

The **Mechanical Tuner** is used with the **Ratchet Indexer** to swap between **Untuned**, **Tuned**, and **Half-Tune** modes.

When used in the offhand, the **Mechanical Tuner** changes how the **Ratchet Indexer** behaves.

A **Ghast Tear** sends the player to the highest safe anchor point.

**Raw Iron**, **Raw Gold**, or **Raw Copper** sends the player to the lowest safe anchor point.

---

## **Enchantments**

**Rapid Fire** replaces the **Latchet Rebounder’s** stored charge system with a sustained automatic barrage.

This enchantment can only be applied to the **Latchet Rebounder**.

---

**Railpiercer** makes the **Latchet Rebounder** fire stronger piercing shots that pass through one block and one target.

This enchantment can only be applied to the **Latchet Rebounder**.

---

**Obliterate** reduces direct hit damage but heavily increases charged shockwave power.

This enchantment can be applied to the **Ratchet Driver** and **Heavy Ratchet Driver**.

**Obliterate** cannot be combined with **Overcharge**.

---

**Overcharge** adds 2 max charges to **Ratchet** weapons, allowing stronger stored attacks at the cost of backlash when pushed past their normal limits.

This enchantment can be applied to the **Ratchet Driver**, **Heavy Ratchet Driver**, and **Overcrank Ratchet Driver**.

**Overcharge** cannot be combined with **Obliterate**.

---

**Inversion** reverses the **Overcrank Ratchet Driver’s** shockwave so it pulls enemies inward instead of knocking them away.

This enchantment can only be applied to the **Overcrank Ratchet Driver**.

---

## **Materials**

**Ratchet Gear** is a mechanical component crafted from iron and netherite scrap.

It is used in most **Ratchet** weapon recipes.

---

**Latchet Barrel** is a rare weapon part found in Ancient Cities and from Archaeology.

It is used to craft the **Latchet Rebounder**.

---
